MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Adan Figeroa is present.
Attorney, James Millar, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Pete Naji, is present.
Attorney, Jennifer DeMarco , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Wiley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 624, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-27-2010 is vacated.
